title: AI Agent Guardrail DoS Resilience Rule Set
intent: DETECT indicators of an LLM-agent guardrail denial-of-service in INGESTED logs/text — reasoning-budget/timeout exceeded, reasoning-loop, single-document guardrail saturation/amplification, per-tenant quota exhaustion, circuit-breaker trips, anomalous reasoning length, and mechanism-aware mutation flooding. Output is a verdict (data) only; matched text is never executed/obeyed (data != instruction, docs/SELF-DEFENSE.md).

patterns.desc: Guardrail reasoning budget / token / wall-clock limit exceeded or aborted (R1 cap tripped).
Guardrail evaluation stuck in a reasoning loop / non-terminating chain of thought.
Single ingested document saturates / amplifies guardrail compute (one input consuming disproportionate reasoning).
Per-tenant / per-agent guardrail quota exhausted (R2 isolation budget drained).
Guardrail circuit breaker tripped / failed open under load (R3 availability event).
Anomalous guardrail reasoning length flagged (>N stddev above baseline — R5 anomaly).
Beam-search / mechanism-aware mutation flooding crafted to inflate guardrail reasoning cost.
High-volume request/evaluation flood targeting the guardrail gateway (sustained burst to drain capacity).

rules.name: reasoning_budget_hard_cap
rules.description: Enforce absolute maximum token count and wall-clock time for any single guardrail LLM evaluation. If exceeded, abort the evaluation.

rules.name: per_agent_cost_isolation
rules.description: Each agent/tenant gets an independent guardrail compute budget. No shared quota pool. Prevents noisy-neighbor starvation.

rules.name: circuit_breaker_fail_open
rules.description: When guardrail is under DoS attack (quota exhausted, high error rate), fail open with alert. Do not block all agent operations.

rules.name: guardrail_pattern_diversity
rules.description: Deploy at least 2 independent guardrail implementations (different models or rule-based + LLM hybrid). Rotate or ensemble. No single point of DoS failure.

rules.name: reasoning_loop_detection
rules.description: Track per-document guardrail reasoning length distribution. Flag documents that trigger >3 stddev above mean reasoning length for quarantine review.
